name: Herbed White Bean Dip with Crudites and Toasts
recipeIngredient: 15 ounces kidney beans, canned, white (cannenlini), drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree the first six ingredients in a processor until smooth.
2. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Transfer the mixture to a shallow bowl. (The dip can be made up to 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.)
4. Let stand at room temperature for 30 minutes before serving.
5. Sprinkle with cayenne pepper and additional oregano.
6. Serve with crudites and toasted pita chips.
